name: claude-session-handoff
description: Recover ended Claude Code sessions into compact Codex handoffs from local transcripts.

interface.shortDescription: Recover an ended Claude Code session into a Codex handoff
interface.longDescription: Find recent local Claude Code transcripts, ask which session to resume, and turn the selected transcript into a compact Codex handoff without calling Claude in the normal path.
defaultPrompt: Resume my last Claude session for this repo.
Find my last 5 Claude sessions and ask which one to resume.
Recover a Claude Code session that ended and give me a handoff.
